member.name: T:PiPlanningBackend.DTOs.SignalR.BoardLockStateChangedDto
member.summary: Unified DTO for board lock state changes via SignalR

member.name: T:PiPlanningBackend.Filters.ValidateModelStateFilter
member.summary:
Automatically validates ModelState for all API requests with [FromBody] parameters. Returns 400 BadRequest with field-level validation errors without requiring explicit "if (!ModelState.IsValid)" checks in every controller method.
Applied via [ValidateModelState] attribute on controller or method. Or register globally in Program.cs to apply to all controllers.

member.name: M:PiPlanningBackend.Hubs.PlanningHub.BroadcastToBoardAsync(Microsoft.AspNetCore.SignalR.IHubClients,System.Int32,System.String,System.Object,System.String)
member.summary: Broadcast an event to all clients in a board group, optionally excluding the initiator.
member.param: The board ID to broadcast to
The payload to send with the event
Optional connection ID of the initiator to exclude from broadcast

member.name: T:PiPlanningBackend.Middleware.RequestCorrelationMiddleware
member.summary: Middleware for adding and tracking correlation IDs across requests. Extracts correlation ID from X-Correlation-ID header or generates a new one. Stores it in HttpContext.Items for access throughout the request lifecycle.

member.name: M:PiPlanningBackend.Middleware.RequestCorrelationMiddleware.#ctor(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.RequestDelegate,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{PiPlanningBackend.Middleware.RequestCorrelationMiddleware})
member.summary: Middleware for adding and tracking correlation IDs across requests. Extracts correlation ID from X-Correlation-ID header or generates a new one. Stores it in HttpContext.Items for access throughout the request lifecycle.

member.name: M:PiPlanningBackend.Middleware.RequestCorrelationMiddleware.GetCorrelationId(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.HttpContext)
member.summary: Helper method to retrieve correlation ID from HttpContext. Useful in services/controllers that have access to IHttpContextAccessor.

member.name: M:PiPlanningBackend.Services.Implementations.BoardService.LockBoardAsync(System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Lock a board with a password. Scenario A: If no password exists, sets a new password and locks. Scenario B: If password already exists, verifies it and locks.

member.name: M:PiPlanningBackend.Services.Implementations.BoardService.UnlockBoardAsync(System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Unlock a board by verifying the password. Password hash persists after unlock for future locks.

member.name: T:PiPlanningBackend.Services.Implementations.CorrelationIdProvider
member.summary: Provides access to the current request's correlation ID from HttpContext. Encapsulates the logic for retrieving the correlation ID set by RequestCorrelationMiddleware.

member.name: M:PiPlanningBackend.Services.Implementations.CorrelationIdProvider.#ctor(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.IHttpContextAccessor)
member.summary: Provides access to the current request's correlation ID from HttpContext. Encapsulates the logic for retrieving the correlation ID set by RequestCorrelationMiddleware.

member.name: M:PiPlanningBackend.Services.Implementations.CorrelationIdProvider.GetCorrelationId
member.summary: Gets the correlation ID for the current request. Retrieved from HttpContext.Items by RequestCorrelationMiddleware.

member.name: M:PiPlanningBackend.Services.Implementations.SprintService.GenerateSprintsForBoard(PiPlanningBackend.Models.Board,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Generates sprints for a board with auto-calculated dates. Sprint 0 is a placeholder/parking lot (no real dates). Sprints 1-N have actual date ranges based on sprintDurationDays.

member.name: T:PiPlanningBackend.Services.Implementations.TransactionService
member.summary: Implementation of ITransactionService for managing database transactions.

member.name: M:PiPlanningBackend.Services.Implementations.TransactionService.#ctor(PiPlanningBackend.Data.AppDbContext)
member.summary: Implementation of ITransactionService for managing database transactions.

member.name: M:PiPlanningBackend.Services.Implementations.TransactionService.ExecuteInTransactionAsync(System.Func{System.Threading.Tasks.Task})
member.summary: Execute an async operation within a database transaction. Automatically commits on success or rolls back on exception.

member.name: M:PiPlanningBackend.Services.Implementations.TransactionService.ExecuteInTransactionAsync``1(System.Func{System.Threading.Tasks.Task{``0}})
member.summary: Execute an async operation within a database transaction and return result. Automatically commits on success or rolls back on exception.

member.name: M:PiPlanningBackend.Services.Implementations.ValidationService.ValidateBoardExists(System.Int32)
member.summary: Validates that a board exists.

member.name: M:PiPlanningBackend.Services.Implementations.ValidationService.ValidateStoryBelongsToBoard(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Validates that a user story belongs to a specific board.

member.name: M:PiPlanningBackend.Services.Implementations.ValidationService.ValidateTeamMemberBelongsToBoard(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Validates that a team member belongs to a specific board.

member.name: M:PiPlanningBackend.Services.Implementations.ValidationService.ValidateSprintBelongsToBoard(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Validates that a sprint belongs to a specific board.

member.name: M:PiPlanningBackend.Services.Implementations.ValidationService.ValidateFeatureBelongsToBoard(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Validates that a feature belongs to a specific board.

member.name: M:PiPlanningBackend.Services.Implementations.ValidationService.ValidateBoardNotFinalized(PiPlanningBackend.Models.Board,System.String)
member.summary: Validates that a board is not finalized before allowing modifications.

member.name: M:PiPlanningBackend.Services.Implementations.ValidationService.ValidateBoardNotLocked(PiPlanningBackend.Models.Board,System.String)
member.summary: Validates that a board is not locked before allowing modifications.

member.name: M:PiPlanningBackend.Services.Implementations.ValidationService.ValidateTeamMemberCapacity(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Validates team member capacity for a sprint.

member.name: M:PiPlanningBackend.Services.Interfaces.IAzureBoardsService.GetFeatureWithChildrenAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Get a Feature work item along with its child User Stories from Azure Boards.

member.name: M:PiPlanningBackend.Services.Interfaces.IAzureBoardsService.GetUserStoryAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Get a User Story work item from Azure Boards.

member.name: T:PiPlanningBackend.Services.Interfaces.ICorrelationIdProvider
member.summary: Provides access to the current request's correlation ID. Abstracts the correlation ID from the request context.

member.name: M:PiPlanningBackend.Services.Interfaces.ICorrelationIdProvider.GetCorrelationId
member.summary: Gets the correlation ID for the current request. Returns a GUID string that uniquely identifies the request for tracing.

member.name: M:PiPlanningBackend.Services.Interfaces.ISprintService.GenerateSprintsForBoard(PiPlanningBackend.Models.Board,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Generates sprints for a board with auto-calculated dates. Sprint 0 is a placeholder, sprints 1-N have actual date ranges.

member.name: T:PiPlanningBackend.Services.Interfaces.ITransactionService
member.summary: Service for managing database transactions. Ensures multi-step operations either complete fully or rollback entirely.

member.name: M:PiPlanningBackend.Services.Interfaces.ITransactionService.ExecuteInTransactionAsync(System.Func{System.Threading.Tasks.Task})
member.summary: Execute an async operation within a database transaction. Automatically commits on success or rolls back on exception.
member.param: Async operation to execute within transaction
member.exception: Rethrows any exception from the operation after rollback

member.name: M:PiPlanningBackend.Services.Interfaces.ITransactionService.ExecuteInTransactionAsync``1(System.Func{System.Threading.Tasks.Task{``0}})
member.summary: Execute an async operation within a database transaction and return result. Automatically commits on success or rolls back on exception.
member.param: Async operation to execute within transaction
member.exception: Rethrows any exception from the operation after rollback

member.name: M:PiPlanningBackend.Services.Interfaces.IValidationService.ValidateBoardExists(System.Int32)
member.summary: Validates that a board exists.
member.exception: Thrown if board is not found

member.name: M:PiPlanningBackend.Services.Interfaces.IValidationService.ValidateStoryBelongsToBoard(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Validates that a user story belongs to a specific board.
member.exception: Thrown if story doesn't exist or doesn't belong to board

member.name: M:PiPlanningBackend.Services.Interfaces.IValidationService.ValidateTeamMemberBelongsToBoard(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Validates that a team member belongs to a specific board.
member.exception: Thrown if member doesn't exist or doesn't belong to board

member.name: M:PiPlanningBackend.Services.Interfaces.IValidationService.ValidateSprintBelongsToBoard(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Validates that a sprint belongs to a specific board.
member.exception: Thrown if sprint doesn't exist or doesn't belong to board

member.name: M:PiPlanningBackend.Services.Interfaces.IValidationService.ValidateFeatureBelongsToBoard(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Validates that a feature belongs to a specific board.
member.exception: Thrown if feature doesn't exist or doesn't belong to board

member.name: M:PiPlanningBackend.Services.Interfaces.IValidationService.ValidateBoardNotFinalized(PiPlanningBackend.Models.Board,System.String)
member.summary: Validates that a board is not finalized before allowing modifications.

member.name: M:PiPlanningBackend.Services.Interfaces.IValidationService.ValidateBoardNotLocked(PiPlanningBackend.Models.Board,System.String)
member.summary: Validates that a board is not locked before allowing modifications.
member.exception: Thrown if board is locked (403 Forbidden)

member.name: M:PiPlanningBackend.Services.Interfaces.IValidationService.ValidateTeamMemberCapacity(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Validates team member capacity for a sprint.

member.name: T:PiPlanningBackend.Services.Utilities.PasswordHelper
member.summary: Utility class for password hashing and verification using PBKDF2. Implements industry-standard password hashing with salt and configurable iterations.

member.name: M:PiPlanningBackend.Services.Utilities.PasswordHelper.HashPassword(System.String)
member.summary: Hashes a password using PBKDF2 with a cryptographically random salt. Each call generates a unique hash even for the same password.
member.returns: Base64-encoded string in format "salt:hash" separated by colon
member.remarks: The returned string contains both salt and hash. The salt is stored with the hash to enable verification later. Do not attempt to decrypt or reverse this value.

member.name: M:PiPlanningBackend.Services.Utilities.PasswordHelper.VerifyPassword(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Verifies a plain-text password against a stored PBKDF2 hash.
member.param: The base64-encoded "salt:hash" string stored in database
member.returns: True if the password matches the stored hash; otherwise false
member.remarks: Uses constant-time comparison (FixedTimeEquals) to prevent timing attacks. Returns false if the stored hash format is invalid.
